summary: Codex Desktop controls now execute through Codex app-server JSON-RPC when available, while unavailable control remains truthful and Mini App routing stays within the public API boundary. The primary checkout was fast-forwarded to origin/main / v0.4.9 and full main-tree checks passed.
remainingRisk: Real New Desktop Task was not launched against the live model during verification. Repo doctor/verify are WARN, not FAIL, because of existing Codex smoke timeout and public Caddy Mini App route identity warnings.
